meta.title: The hazards of multitasking
meta.sourceDoc: 90. P3 - The hazards of multitasking 多任务处理.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The hazards of multitasking 多任务处理

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：B
PDF 定位：B Ernst Poppel
PDF 解析：*believes that it is *impossible to carry out two or 无法同度集中=若同做多事，每事获注意更少。 three different tasks simultaneously with the same degree of concentration."第4段

题目 28
答案：C
PDF 定位：C David E. Meyer
PDF 解析：频察改任务→大脑需重新加载规则，调整时间变长。 "Each switchover from one task to another meant re- thinking. it takes the brain longer to adapt when switching rapidly back..."-第6段

题目 29
答案：A
PDF 定位：A John Ridley Stroop
PDF 解析：...participants were asked to name the colour of a 读调这一自动技能干扰说颜色，体现"一项技能阻碍另 word... they experienced difficulty...* 第3段 一任务"。

题目 30
答案：B
PDF 定位：B Ernst Poppel
PDF 解析：...processing... actually take place in three-second 大脑只能在<3秒内聚焦一件事，随后换焦。 windows..."-第5段

题目 31
答案：D
PDF 定位：D Edward Hallowell & John Ratey
PDF 解析：*..multitasking can bring about a brain condition 指多任务可能引发医学/脑部问题。 that causes sufferers to constantly seek new information...-第8段

题目 32
答案：B
PDF 解析：场景段："startto feela headachecomingon...多任务 头痛+忙乱表现"工作负荷压垮"。 塞满。"一第1段

题目 33
答案：D
PDF 解析："possible dangers of divided attention for drivers, 引用原因是他们若失误代价极高→不能犯错。 air-traffic controllers...-第2段

题目 34
答案：C
PDF 解析："participants were asked to name the colour 难点是说出印刷颜色名字(而非词义)。 of a word such as 'green' printed in red... they experienced difficulty"-第3段

题目 35
答案：forehead
PDF 定位：forehead
PDF 解析："Located behind the forehead, the prefrontal 按题干"found to the rear of the cortex.."-第7段

题目 36
答案：mental resources
PDF 定位：mental resources
PDF 解析：分配资源。 .prioritise them and assign mental resources" 一第7段

题目 37
答案：cells
PDF 定位：cells
PDF 解析："stress can also affect brain cells in another region, 题干已有"inthehippocampus，只填cells即可。 thehippocampus.."-第7段

题目 38
答案：new memories
PDF 定位：new memories
PDF 解析：*..mportant for forming new memories...第7段 储存记忆。

题目 39
答案：new skills
PDF 定位：new skills
PDF 解析：*..makes it difficult..to acquire new skills.第7段 学习新技能。

题目 40
答案：B
PDF 解析：文章核心在于挑战普追观念，而非列举用途/专讲损伤/ 通篇结构：先述"掌握multitasking是常识"，后用多项研 究驳斥其高效性。 呼吁实验。
